notes: Running head matches. Body is correct except for captured left-margin line number 87 before verse 76. Apparatus mostly matches, but the verse-84 entry '84 ἱερεῖς] + δουλοι Κυριου και τα' is omitted, causing the following '87mg Syrmg' to be misattached; apparatus also includes '80 om πάντα' which the transcription lacks in accented form.
